text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the last day of summer camp for the senior
racers. The bus to take us back to the academy is
parked out front.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I can't believe summer camp is over already, but I know we gave it our best.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you look pretty sleepy, Trainer. You should
rest up on the ride home.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Yawn... I hope you don't mind if I do as well.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide gets on the bus. I'm about to
follow her on but pause when a nearby
conversation catches my attention.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text: Did you get a look at Narita Brian's training?

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text: I sure did. I can't believe how fast she is.

text_block_list.name: Skilled Trainer
text_block_list.text:
The most unbelievable part is how she's still
dissatisfied with her growth despite how much
she's already improved. That's the sign of
someone with real potential.

text_block_list.name: Veteran Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. She's going to be a real beast. And to think
she'll be participating in the Arima Kinen in just
six months...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be long before Narita Brian catches all
the way up to us...
